analysis.reasoning: The tweet emphasizes that China will pursue peaceful development and will not seek hegemony or expansion, presenting China as a benevolent and responsible power. The message most directly corresponds to CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) due to the explicit anti-hegemonism/peaceful development framing, and also aligns with CH2 (China is a benevolent power) through the cooperative, non-threatening posture.
